meta.title: Velaris — Light Your Cosmos
meta.description: Hand-poured celestial candles for women who move through the world with intention. Premium soy wax, phthalate-free fragrance, crafted in Florida.

hero.headline: Light your cosmos.
hero.subheadline: Hand-poured candles for women who move through the world with intention.

featured.label: Collections
featured.headline: The cosmos, distilled into flame.
featured.description: Each Velaris candle begins as a ritual — a slow pour, a chosen scent, a moment named. Explore collections shaped by the sky.

collections.moonPhasesDesc: Eight candles mapping the lunar cycle. Clean to complex, mirroring the moon's energy arc.
collections.zodiacDesc: Twelve candles, each with a sign-specific scent profile grounded in elemental astrology.
collections.nebulaDesc: Large-format prestige candles representing cosmic phenomena. Galaxy-effect vessels, gift-box ready.
collections.floridaCosmosDesc: Seasonal and geographically specific. Celestial identity meets local sense-memory.

brandStory.label: Our Story
brandStory.headline: Some things begin in the dark.
brandStory.text: We started with a flame and a question: what does the universe smell like? Velaris was born in South Florida, poured by hand, and designed for the woman who finds ceremony in small things. Every candle is a sky, and every sky belongs to you.

socialProof.headline: Lit by real women, across every cosmos.

giftSets.headline: Give them the sky.
giftSets.subheadline: Curated gift sets for birthdays, manifestations, or no reason at all.

newsletter.headline: Enter the orbit.
newsletter.subtext: New rituals, limited drops, and celestial dispatches — delivered to your inbox.

footer.madeIn: Hand-poured with intention in South Florida.

about.headline: Some things begin in the dark.
about.text1: Velaris started the way most true things do — quietly, without a plan. In a small kitchen in South Florida, surrounded by late-night humidity and the kind of stillness that makes you think, our founder began pouring candles not to sell them, but to feel something. To make the ordinary luminous.
about.text2: The name came from the stars. Velaris — a place imagined to be radiant, hidden, worth protecting. That felt right. Because a candle, at its best, does exactly that: it reveals something in a room, and something in you.
about.text3: Every Velaris candle is hand-poured in small batches using 100% natural soy wax and premium fragrance oils that are phthalate-free and skin-safe. We work in slow, deliberate rounds — never rushing a pour, never scaling past what we can control.
about.text4: Our customers are women who move with intention. Who light a candle before journaling, before a hard conversation, before a bath, before nothing at all. Who understand that atmosphere is not a luxury — it's a language.
about.text5: We are based in Florida and proud to serve a bilingual community. Our candles are for all of you.
about.closingLine: Welcome to the cosmos. It's yours.

faq.headline: Questions & Answers
faq.q1: What are Velaris candles made of?
faq.a1: All Velaris candles are made with 100% natural soy wax and premium fragrance oils that are phthalate-free and skin-safe. Our wicks are unbleached cotton or sustainably sourced wood.
faq.q2: How long do the candles burn?
faq.a2: Our 8 oz candles burn for approximately 45-50 hours. Our 12 oz Nebula collection candles burn for approximately 65-70 hours. Always trim your wick to 1/4 inch before lighting.
faq.q3: Do you ship to all of the United States?
faq.a3: Yes! We ship to all 50 states. Orders over $65 qualify for free shipping. Standard delivery takes 3-5 business days.
faq.q4: Can I return or exchange a candle?
faq.a4: We accept returns on unused, unopened candles within 30 days of delivery. If your candle arrives damaged, contact us immediately and we'll make it right.
faq.q5: Are your candles vegan and cruelty-free?
faq.a5: Yes. All Velaris candles are 100% vegan and cruelty-free. We never test on animals.
faq.a6: Yes! Add gift wrapping at checkout for $5. Each gift arrives in our signature celestial box with a handwritten note option.
